data.title: Arweave’s AR.IO Launches Mainnet & Token: Here are the Details
data.description:
TL;DR AR.IO launched its mainnet and token generation event (TGE), offering a permanent cloud storage solution based on Arweave. Unlike traditional services, it allows users to pay once for data storage without the need for renewals or risk of losing access to their files. The network introduced its ARIO token, with a total supply of ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/arweaves-ar-io-launches-mainnet-token-here-are-the-details/

data.title: Zelenskyy blocks Trump’s Truth Social network across Ukraine
data.description:
Multiple reports on social media say US President Donald Trump’s social media platform, Truth Social, has been shut down in Ukraine. The app’s countrywide block comes on the backdrop of Trump calling Ukrainian President Zelenskyy a “dictator without elections.” Through a Truth Social post on Wednesday, Donald Trump took a few digs at Zelenskyy, accusing […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zelensky-blocks-trumps-truth-social-ukraine/

data.title: SEC Scales Back Crypto Enforcement, Expands Focus To Cyber Fraud
data.description:
SEC restructures enforcement approach, replacing cryptocurrency unit with smaller team focused on cyber fraud and technological threats.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43857831/sec-scales-back-crypto-enforcement-expands-focus-to-cyber-fraud?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: SEC's CETU UNIT's Astonishing Focus on Crypto and AI Fraud
data.description:
SEC's CETU Unit is a newly formed division focused on combating fraud in crypto and AI, representing a major regulatory shift under the Trump administration.
source: https://coincu.com/323383-secs-cetu-unit-focus-crypto-ai-fraud

data.title: Ethereum Price Prediction: Recession To $2.5K On The Way?
data.description:
Ethereum’s price prediction is trending toward negative, raising concerns about potential downside risks. The BTC/Ethereum MVRV Momentum Oscillator (180-day) chart reveals the Ethereum momentum getting dragged into negative territory after a long period of bullishness. Past instances have occurred before sharp corrections in ETH’s price, which coincide with market anomalies. The chart data...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/20/ethereum-price-prediction-recession-to-2-5k-on-the-way/

data.title: SEC approves first yield-bearing stablecoin security
data.description:
Figure Markets has become the first company to receive approval for an interest-bearing stablecoin in the United States.

data.title: After years of economic pain, Russia reverses course on the US
data.description:
For the past three years, Russia has had the United States as its number one enemy, attacking its leadership, economy, and influence at every turn. Moscow framed Washington as an imperialist force trying to dominate the global order, and Washington, in turn, took every opportunity to paint Russia as a collapsing power. US sanctions crippled […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/after-years-of-economic-pain-russia-reverses-course-on-the-us/

data.title: Silk Road founder calls for support to release 'Bitcoin Jesus' Roger Ver
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Silk Road founder Ross Ulbricht posted a message on the X platform calling for support for the release of "Bitcoin Jesus" Roger Ver, saying that when he was depressed and needed help, Roger Ver was always by his side, and now Roger needs our support.
No one should spend the rest of his life in prison for paying taxes. Let him pay taxes (if any) and then be done with it.

data.title: Silk Road Founder Calls For Support Of Roger Ver's Release
data.description: According to Odaily, Silk Road founder Ross Ulbricht has taken to the X platform to rally support for the release of Roger Ver, known as 'Bitcoin Jesus.' Ulbricht expressed gratitude for Ver's support during his own difficult times and emphasized that Ver now needs public backing. He argued that no one should spend their life in prison over tax issues, suggesting that Ver should simply pay any owed taxes and be released.
